textByHash.01094a5a343776c0367425caf7bfdf5623407560: I'll charge 1,250,000 coins to construct it. What d'ye say?
textByHash.03e2f13dad90271203b2b7b990e373ac0584d6c1: Alright, I'll see you later. Can't wait to move in!
textByHash.0ac6e70e3c549e78352b72ff89fae7c769cfb0b5: Amazin'! Ye can almost feel it pulsing with draconic power!
textByHash.0e94f99d1e1b1d83147911e10eec975f581f1507: Have ye slayed that dragon yet?
textByHash.133001f70e9787b5ba24b38ef5c5386fa05f7959: This 'draconic visage' had the power to channel dragonfire. Now, if I could attach the visage to the front of this shield...
textByHash.17f1e1c8adcc120dbd026f47fd8c875da749b1ea: It'll be for all dragon slayers I know, there's a lot of us!
textByHash.190a7873216e5ac64ddc1085ec44f46b6e8a94d3: Hello! It's not going well. There are a lot of ghosts here!
textByHash.191cf161d842de5991e64a71728e4a9255841dda: This shield turned up, recently... I believe it belongs to you.
textByHash.1a6e33d68a8fd0cad2f296d4d5a4bbed6f34f762: The solving of this puzzle could be the key to your treasure.
textByHash.1f5ee358ccad7cc511704a9a527655be9f601487: Of course! TWO ghosts is scary, but not that scary!
textByHash.260345929131000764adb7a8bc73675aeffab494: I thought not. I'm the master smith of Misthalin! So, shall I construct the shield for you?
textByHash.274a428a262130e0018906c206c1e6b71041ec5e: Aye, 'tis a fair day, my mighty dragon-slaying friend.
textByHash.2d1cdc1fc3919de135ee8345a376602faa79337e: I ain't got nothing to sell ye, adventurer. Leave me be!
textByHash.38ff92bad426ca50a44f723a9dac83e37cec1cef: Now, if ye want me to, I could attach this to yer anti-dragonbreath shield and make something pretty special.
textByHash.3af3d57c6918fe267767bbc04b5454dee074a423: Go talk to the Guildmaster in the Champions' Guild. He'll help ye out if yer so keen on doing a quest. I'm not going to be handholding any adventurers.
textByHash.4cec580fafc69dbe837fda0530dc39d5091c600f: Hah, yes, you are a typical reckless adventurer, aren't you? Now go kill the dragon and get out of my face.
textByHash.50c8bb86144d5c7e47711bb74e9a8d20e8ece744: Don't do that! I don't like ghosts.
textByHash.56ce1ae9524dd08e42eee0ffed21d855bb8f3e55: Well, however you found out about it, I'm not going to let just anyone wear my rune platemail. It's only for heroes. So leave me alone.
textByHash.58419320fc230fe8ccc36e84ffc24a0ef908d657: I'll hire myself one of those slayers we see everywhere.
textByHash.5c564589b65f26cbbfdccae41fd4b8cf6d699eb4: I see ye've got one of them anti-dragon shields there. I've got an idea about them things.
textByHash.5c6b3d290fa7555e64c728b62d726c84f962cf11: Now, if ye bring me this and the anti-dragonbreath shield, I reckon I could combine them into something pretty special!
textByHash.652102ad7f5879b26052b0c816fc42b5036fb512: Aye, may the gods walk by yer side. Now leave me alone.
textByHash.673d4bd362a31fac69564320decafbb562fbdd2a: All right, I'll give ye a quest. I'll let ye wear my rune platemail if ye...
textByHash.6bc2b6a50efc2b135d8bb9f9096b71ef7b3a5544: I'm surprised if you're anyone's friend with those kind of manners.
textByHash.731571d81b306fcb900b3ba3678eab425567e657: As a little thank you for the help!
textByHash.79bc58956f9b5586d13ff2416c01dfd507046a0d: Good luck wi' that. They're mighty rare, so yer quest will take some time. If any monsters have them, it'll be the dragons.
textByHash.8152bd0cfcab2a71a542133dadd9f9c56856fe6d: It's the Guildmaster in the Champions' Guild who hands those keys out now. Go talk to him. No need to bother me if you don't need armour.
textByHash.837b996cdffefa339c46c8ca2cad0079f0353bb5: Yes, I can understand that. Yer a coward.
textByHash.8525ef37444799aae01a8ce7ad87ef900d51cd4e: Why, ain't it obvious? Ye could project blasts of dragonfire from yer shield!
textByHash.8bb88f11a79c69b052f3ec077cb57839a16cf3f2: They will help with the ghost problem!
textByHash.95a17a6232a31b771874682404db9ae9988c5df9: See, when ye uses them to fight a dragon, they absorb the fire. The shield must be storing the dragonfire, and just letting it radiate away.
textByHash.9ac562943a38ab1e0aac48e78983a52ba6292fca: Or maybe a green, in memory of Elvarg, a very mean dragon.
textByHash.9c51324cfcad6e569958a22c07ce68f41e0424db: I have a few. I might convert the top floor into a bar!
textByHash.a29f138c5af6a7ed29d0ca3ba4355ad5811ddb96: I'm thinking a nice bold red, like the dragon armour.
textByHash.a96c8ab8293eedb47ae2a7651562e880673ac6af: Maybe, it depends how haunted. I'm not a big fan of ghosts.
textByHash.ab25f1f78025f92113778772e5c583c0a47f789e: Now, if there was only a way to get the dragonfire out again...
textByHash.ada3a2ed0ad1c3b53faa2f3d5e856cf9978de1eb: Ye know, I think there might be a way.
textByHash.ae5510d6cb80f2026c07c76e59754ebc4745be7a: So many ghosts... I need some help!
textByHash.af6d78fa891b9076ee8616d6441735b9d8272c02: Well, normally you'd have to slay a dragon for me...
textByHash.b0e271f65927fe835a152fd56e796db4c384aeef: Yes, I suppose he would, wouldn't he? He's always sending you fancy-pants 'heroes' up to bother me. Telling me I'll give them a quest or sommat like that.
textByHash.b8433a7f046ee0b40823cfee435e2e27f010ad86: Yer a true hero, and I'd be happy to sell ye rune platebodies.
textByHash.b94db92a2ad2f88020dececfe50fd6ac42210e2f: Oh! Well, I suppose ye don't need me for this then.
textByHash.b9bb604290a9b7f1de7a89281cf69215f5903372: Ah!! Why did you do that?
textByHash.ba90b50d296ce80ed644a0574974e8c53af4a6e1: Yes it is. But I'm a master smith so I reckon I can charge what I like. Unless ye've got level 90 Smithing too, which I doubt!
textByHash.c2180602fd7ac783852984ae9dc24aff6eb47392: I can't wait to complete the purchase!
textByHash.c644fbf86fa0f2e603f8434c9d57513d1c6ff10d: There ye go. Now, the more dragonfire the shield absorbs, the more powerful it'll become.
textByHash.ccef49d6cbc4f800e57ce4f600ef9db028770ff8: Well, I'm not going to let just anyone wear my rune platemail. It's only for heroes. So, leave me alone.
textByHash.d950521b5917a71a804e4a6822587dee62e9db2c: Aye, 'tis a fair day my friend.
textByHash.dac91678870428927a5c05d79761143784d3a0f4: I've heard legends of a thing called a 'draconic visage'. It was made by the dragonkin themselves apparently.
textByHash.dd4f8eef3685c04dd2d5d7e45814e1c4e7462587: So, how does thee know I 'ave some?
textByHash.eaa3b6e7526fce06c079523cd67a98c624445538: I underestimated ye, adventurer. I apologise.
textByHash.fb3407eb8954d8a7401e50880449d5d8956ac81d: ...but maybe I can make an exception once I've moved in here.
